arts.ttl: Copa del Rey round-up: Holders Athletic Club knocked out, Real Sociedad secure progression
arts.sum: The last 16 of the Copa del Rey concluded on Thursday with three more matches: holders Athletic Club hosted Osasuna, Real Sociedad took on Rayo Vallecano, while Real Madrid faced Celta Vigo in the late kick-off. Athletic Club 2-3 Osasuna It was a spectacular match at San Mames, where holders Athletic Club were dumped out […] The post Copa del Rey round-up: Holders Athletic Club knocked out, Real Sociedad secure progression appeared first on Football España.
